content: Just as the language learning sense of reflexion as deliberate review of one’s own written output helps high school learners refine their expression, structuring graded language use, the same spaced deliberate reflexion practice (rooted in human metacognition from language learning can improve LLM self-reflection mechanisms. Specifically, high school writing workshop reflexion routines, which guides learners to compare multiple drafts against learning objectives, can be adapted to build structured multi-step reflexion frameworks for LLMs that outperform current ad-hoc self-reflection approaches.
